frames.desc: Creator on camera, mid-sentence, neutral background
Close-up of hands shaping clay on a wheel
Finished pottery pieces on a shelf
Creator smiling, holding a finished mug

segments.text: I quit my nine to five to do this full time.
Everyone said it was crazy, but here's what happened.
Six months in, and I'm finally making it work.

transcript.text: I quit my nine to five to do this full time. Everyone said it was crazy, but here's what happened. Six months in, and I'm finally making it work.

metrics.cap: I quit my 9-5 to make pottery

analysis.summary: Strong hook and a clear payoff structure. Retention holds well past the 3-second mark, with the steepest drop early as viewers wait for the reveal.
analysis.hook: The first 3 seconds open on a bold on-screen claim ('I QUIT MY 9-5') over a direct-to-camera line — high curiosity, 86% held.

dropoff.why: Curiosity gap created but payoff hasn't landed yet — impatient viewers leave.
Mid-roll lull on the shelf shot with no narration to pull viewers forward.

suggestions: Front-load the reveal: tease the finished mug in the first second.
Add a caption during the 10-14s shelf shot to maintain momentum.
Tighten the intro by ~1s to reduce the early drop.
